title: Third RealMLP seed selected by low correlation
summary: Add a third RealMLP seed chosen for low prediction correlation with the current core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Train a small candidate set of extra RealMLP seeds on the same folds, evaluate OOF AUC and correlation to the two-seed core, choose an acceptable low-correlation seed, and average it into the RealMLP core before the same CatBoost correction.
expected_effect: Improve ensemble diversity rather than merely selecting the highest single-seed OOF.
risk: Seed selection on OOF can overfit and increases training cost.
